creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #4)
Understood, and thanks, Kubilay Kocak.

I did it because it was [mistakenly] assigned
to MAINTAINER dhn@ for approval. Since dhn@ is
not the maintainer, and worse, had their commit
bit revoked. I wanted to draw attention to this.

Would it be better for me to close this PR, and
open a new one, so this will [hopefully] be
recognized as a NEW port, and subsequently,
be assigned correctly?

Thanks again, Kubilay Kocak.

--Chris
